overview.Name: Brookfield Corp
overview.Description: Brookfield Corporation is an alternative asset manager and REIT/Real Estate Investment Manager firm focuses on real estate, renewable power, infrastructure and venture capital and private equity assets. The company is headquartered in Toronto, Canada with additional offices across Northern America; South America; Europe; Middle East and Asia.
overview.Address: BROOKFIELD PLACE, TORONTO, ON, CANADA, M5J 2T3
